name: Red-Eyes Metal Claws Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真紅眼の鋼爪竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レッドアイズ・メタルクロウドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can activate "Metalmorph" Traps the turn they were Set. You can only use each of the following effects of "Red-Eyes Metal Claws Dragon" once per turn. You can send 1 face-down card you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned, and you have "Max Metalmorph" in your field or GY: You can add 1 "Metalmorph" Trap from your Deck or GY to your hand.
mnst_eff: You can activate "Metalmorph" Traps the turn they were Set. You can only use each of the following effects of "Red-Eyes Metal Claws Dragon" once per turn. You can send 1 face-down card you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned, and you have "Max Metalmorph" in your field or GY: You can add 1 "Metalmorph" Trap from your Deck or GY to your hand.
eff: You can activate "Metalmorph" Traps the turn they were Set. You can only use each of the following effects of "Red-Eyes Metal Claws Dragon" once per turn. You can send 1 face-down card you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned, and you have "Max Metalmorph" in your field or GY: You can add 1 "Metalmorph" Trap from your Deck or GY to your hand.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
